Metamask Card Pre-order

You might have an out-of-this-world vision for the next big thing
in Fintech, but don’t have the right resources.
That’s where we step in.
*This is a corporate website, if you are a consumer please visit our B2C website at baanxapp.com
Whitelist Wallet
Crypto Life Card
Modular Fintech Platform
Fiat & Digital Asset Friendly
Instant Cards as a Service

The future of finance is promising for many, and we’re helping to build it. The Baanx Group bridges the gap between fiat and digital asset technology to provide you with an API-driven platform that allows you to create disruptive, cutting-edge digital products that will bring your vision to life.

About us
The building blocks for your business using Baanx unique APIs

Digital Fintech APIs

We don’t believe in “one size fits all”. That’s why we offer a range of Web & Mobile App modules, tailor-made to your brand and sector. Alternatively, if you just want to boost your existing products, we also provide top compatible APIs, including Cards, Remittance, FX, Exchanges and Wallets.

Learn more

Payments

Nobody likes slow payments or high transaction fees. Luckily, with just a few lines of code, you can offer your customers fast, transparent and low-cost payments anywhere in the world.

Learn more

Compliance as a service

Starting up a Fintech is already hard work, without the extra worries over compliance. Don’t fear - Baanx is your one-stop-shop for all your compliance needs, including transaction monitoring, biometric KYC & AML, fraud prevention, risk monitoring and more.

Learn more

Digital assets

Instant Text Remittance of Fiat & Digital Assets, exchanges. IBANS as a Service for Retail & Corporate customers.

Learn more

Why choose Baanx?

Using a combination of next-generation fintech and blockchain technologies, Baanx offers over 30 APIs to help build your perfect financial product.
